title: [phase:critique] [family:backend-fit] [provider_hint:codex] Review suitability of the Google AI agents technical guidance for using Google agent tooling as the backend layer for Cursorvers.Inc. Focus on risks, lock-in, security, and what should not be delegated to agents. Findings first.
summary_text: **Completion Criteria (Definition of Done)** 1. Caller migration is complete and stable: `line-webhook` uses wrappers for both tools with pre-validation and no direct `runRiskChecker` / `runPromptPolisher` calls in handlers ([index.ts:11](#/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts:11), [index.ts:735](#/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts:735), [index.ts:821](#/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts:821)). 2. Caller-visible behavior parity is explicit for edge cases: blank input, over-limit input, rate-limit, wrapper failure (`userError`), and unexpected throw all produce intended user messages ([index.ts:683](#/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts:683), [index.ts:769](#/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts:769), [index.ts:693](#/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts:693), [index.ts:779](#/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts:779), [index.ts:741](#/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts:741), [index.ts:827](#/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts:827)). 3. Length policy is consistent across caller and wrapper contracts (no accepted input later rejected in wrapper): currently enforced via `Math.min` gate ([index.ts:129](#/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts:129), [index.ts:133](#/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts:133), [cursorvers-wrapper-validation.ts:36](#/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/_shared/cursorvers-wrapper-validation.ts:36)). 4. Integration test gate exists at `index.ts` caller level, not only lib/wrapper unit tests. 5. Docs and runbooks reflect wrapper-based architecture and current test surface. **Remaining Gaps After Prompt/Risk Caller Migration** **Code gaps** 1. Risk output currently appends Discord footer twice: once inside risk formatter and again in handler ([risk-checker.ts:396](#/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/lib/risk-checker.ts:396), [index.ts:823](#/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts:823)). 2. `pushText` has no message-length guard; long formatted risk output can fail at LINE API boundary ([line-api.ts:99](#/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/lib/line-api.ts:99)). 3. Wrapper facade imports `detectCourseKeyword` through diagnosis modules, which drags Supabase side effects into wrapper test/runtime graph ([cursorvers-wrapper-facade.ts:1](#/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/_shared/cursorvers-wrapper-facade.ts:1), [diagnosis-handlers.ts:15](#/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/lib/diagnosis-handlers.ts:15), [user-state.ts:6](#/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/lib/user-state.ts:6), [supabase.ts:22](#/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/_shared/supabase.ts:22)). **Test gaps** 1. No tests target migrated caller behavior in `line-webhook/index.ts` (ack reply + async push + wrapper error mapping); current documented suite is lib-focused ([test/README.md:48](#/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/test/README.md:48)). 2. Wrapper tests mostly assert failure-path sanitization, not success-path mapping fidelity ([cursorvers-wrapper_test.ts:53](#/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/_shared/cursorvers-wrapper_test.ts:53)). 3. `_shared` tests depend on Supabase env presence due import side effects; CI stability depends on environment being set...
